articles.title: Gajapati district officials foil couple’s bid to marry off minor daughter
articles.description: Gajapati district administration successfully thwarted a child marriage bid in Goshani block, rescuing a minor girl scheduled to marry a man over 30. Officials intervened after receiving a tip-off, ensuring the girl's safety and providing counselling. Her parents have given a written assurance to prevent her marriage until she turns 18 and to prioritize her education.

articles.title: China Issues Urgent SOS to Nationals In Iran Amid Fears Of Resumption Of Hostilities In MidEast
articles.description: Beijing has just sent a chilling signal to the world. China’s Foreign Ministry is ordering all its nationals in Iran to relocate to "safer areas" immediately, citing a security environment that is becoming "complex and severe." This isn't just a routine travel advisory—it’s a strategic freeze on movement that often precedes massive military escalation. As Chinese citizens are told to avoid military zones at all costs, the message is clear: Beijing believes the window for safety in Tehran is rapidly closing.

articles.title: West Bengal exit polls 2026 Date and Time: Check when you can get an idea who is leading the TMC vs BJP race
articles.description: Campaigning concludes for West Bengal's final election phase as attention turns to voting and upcoming exit polls. A silence period is in effect until 6:00 PM on April 29, prohibiting election content on media platforms. Exit polls for multiple states are slated for release on April 29 after 6:30 PM, with vote counting scheduled for May 4.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by James Baldwin: “A child cannot be taught without respect” — lessons on honesty, education, trust, and emotional understanding by one of the most powerful voices on race and society in the 20th century
articles.description: James Baldwin shares a powerful idea about teaching and truth. His quote shows that children need respect and honesty to learn properly. It explains how emotions and trust play a big role in education. His words still guide teachers, parents, and young people to build better understanding and real learning.

articles.title: Portuguese proverb of the day: “A barking dog does not bite” – life lessons on human nature, fear, psychology and why actions matter more than words
articles.description: Portuguese proverb of the day: “A barking dog does not bite,” highlights the difference between words and real action in human behavior. The timeless wisdom suggests that people who make loud threats, strong claims, or aggressive statements are often less likely to act on them. The proverb teaches an important life lesson about understanding intentions beyond appearances and not being intimidated by empty words.
